meta.title: ClipQuiz — Guess from Clips, Images & Audio
meta.description: The global guessing game platform. Play image, crop & music quizzes. Beat the percentile. Go viral.

hero.title: Guess. Compete.
hero.subtitle: Image quizzes. Cropped close-ups. Music clips. Type your answer, beat the crowd, and share your rank.

image.title: Image Quiz
image.desc: See the picture. Type the answer. Classic visual trivia.

crop.title: Crop Challenge
crop.desc: Only a tiny slice is shown. Can you still recognize it?

audio.title: Audio Clip
audio.desc: Hear a few seconds of a song. Name it before time runs out.

quiz.question: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.audioHint: Audio only — no video or title shown

results.title: Your Results
results.shareText: I scored {score}/{total} on "{title}" — Top {percent}%! Can you beat me?

create.title: Create Your Quiz
create.subtitle: Build a quiz in minutes. Share the link. Watch it blow up.
create.answersHelp: Up to {max} accepted answers, one per line (spaces ignored when checking)
create.successDesc: Share your quiz and challenge the world.
create.loginNote: No account needed — just pick a creator name

step1.title: Pick a Quiz
step1.desc: Browse trending quizzes or search by category.

step2.title: Type Your Answers
step2.desc: No multiple choice — type what you know. Partial matches count.

step3.title: Beat the Crowd
step3.desc: See your percentile rank and share your score with friends.

footer.tagline: Made for streamers, friend groups, and trivia addicts worldwide.

ads.label: Advertisement
ads.slotMissing: Set AdSense slot ID in environment variables

cookies.message: We use essential cookies to run ClipQuiz and remember your preferences.
cookies.messageAds: We use cookies for site functionality and to show ads via Google AdSense. Third parties, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on your visits.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: ClipQuiz ("we", "our") operates a free online quiz platform at clipquiz.app and related domains. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body:
• Quiz content you create (title, questions, creator name)
• Quiz scores and play statistics
• Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited (via hosting and analytics)
• Cookies for preferences and advertising (see below)

sections.title: Google AdSense & Advertising Cookies
sections.body:
We use Google AdSense to display ads. Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on a user's prior visits to our website or other websites.

Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to users based on their visit to our sites and/or other sites on the Internet.

Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings: https://www.google.com/settings/ads

Alternatively, visit www.aboutads.info to opt out of third-party vendors' use of cookies for personalized advertising.

See how Google uses data when you use our partners' sites: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

sections.title: How We Use Data
sections.body: We use collected data to operate the service, calculate percentile rankings, display ads, prevent abuse, and improve the platform. We do not sell personal information.

sections.title: User-Generated Content
sections.body: Quizzes you create are publicly visible. Do not submit personal data, copyrighted material without permission, or illegal content. We may remove content that violates our Terms.

sections.title: Data Storage
sections.body: Data is stored on secure cloud infrastructure (Vercel, Supabase). You may request deletion of user-created quizzes by contacting us.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: Questions about this policy: contact@clipquiz.app

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.body: By using ClipQuiz, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.body: ClipQuiz provides image, crop, and audio guessing quizzes. Users may play quizzes and create their own. The service is provided "as is" without warranty.

sections.title: User Content
sections.body:
You are responsible for quizzes you create. You must not upload illegal, hateful, sexually explicit, or infringing content. We may remove content and block abuse without notice.

You grant ClipQuiz a license to host and display your quiz content on the platform.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Seed quizzes and site design belong to ClipQuiz. Third-party images, music, and trademarks belong to their owners. Use only content you have rights to use.

sections.title: Age Requirement
sections.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use ClipQuiz. Users under 18 should have parental consent.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: ClipQuiz is not liable for indirect damages, data loss, or third-party content. Use the service at your own risk.

sections.title: Changes
sections.body: We may update these Terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

about.title: About ClipQuiz
about.intro: ClipQuiz is a global guessing game platform inspired by classic trivia sites — built for international audiences from day one.

sections.title: What We Offer
sections.body:
• Image quizzes — see a photo, type the answer
• Crop challenges — extreme zoom on a tiny slice
• Audio clips — hear a few seconds, name the song
• Percentile rankings and score sharing
• Create your own quiz in minutes — no account required

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.body: We make viral trivia accessible worldwide with 5 languages, mobile-friendly design, and fair free-to-play access. Whether you're a streamer, friend group, or trivia fan — guess, compete, share.

sections.title: Original Content
sections.body: ClipQuiz includes 14+ original seed quizzes covering geography, music, movies, food, gaming, and more. User-created quizzes add fresh content daily.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Questions, feedback, content reports, or partnership inquiries — we'd love to hear from you.

sections.title: Content Reports
sections.body: To report inappropriate user-created quizzes, email us with the quiz link and reason. We review reports promptly.

sections.title: Privacy Requests
sections.body: To request deletion of user-created content associated with your creator name, contact us with the quiz ID.

sections.title: Business
sections.body: For advertising, sponsorship, or media inquiries, reach out via email.
